ml_top_positive_drivers.interpretation: Clean promoter background — low character risk
No material litigation — low legal risk
Large listed company — asset base inferred
Strong interest coverage → high debt service capacity

decision_rationale: Tata Motors Limited demonstrates exceptional creditworthiness, meriting an 'APPROVE' decision. This is underpinned by excellent Character (90) due to strong Tata Group governance and no red flags, and outstanding Capacity (95) with an Interest Coverage Ratio of 85.74x and robust profitability. Strong Capital (90) is evidenced by a low Debt-to-Equity of 0.6x and a net cash positive position, further complemented by substantial Collateral (85) from a large asset base. The overall Blended Risk Score of 90.08/100, combined with a Research Rating of 'A', supports the recommended loan amount and interest rate.
